name: ascii-shapes
description: 17 animated ASCII art components (Spiral, Rose, Wave, Vortex, Pulse, Matrix, Grid, Torus, Sphere, Cube, Helix, Donut, Trefoil Knot, Geodesic Dome, Saturn, Hyperboloid, DNA) with 5 character sets, 4 sizes, and SSR-safe static mode

files.content:
export { default as AsciiSpiral }  from './AsciiSpiral.vue'
export { default as AsciiRose }    from './AsciiRose.vue'
export { default as AsciiWave }    from './AsciiWave.vue'
export { default as AsciiVortex }  from './AsciiVortex.vue'
export { default as AsciiPulse }   from './AsciiPulse.vue'
export { default as AsciiMatrix }  from './AsciiMatrix.vue'
export { default as AsciiGrid }    from './AsciiGrid.vue'
export { default as AsciiTorus }   from './AsciiTorus.vue'
export { default as AsciiSphere }  from './AsciiSphere.vue'
export { default as AsciiCube }    from './AsciiCube.vue'
export { default as AsciiHelix }   from './AsciiHelix.vue'
export { default as AsciiDonut }       from './AsciiDonut.vue'
export { default as AsciiTrefoilKnot } from './AsciiTrefoilKnot.vue'
export { default as AsciiGeodesicDome } from './AsciiGeodesicDome.vue'
export { default as AsciiSaturn }      from './AsciiSaturn.vue'
export { default as AsciiHyperboloid } from './AsciiHyperboloid.vue'
export { default as AsciiDNA }         from './AsciiDNA.vue'

export type { AsciiSize, AsciiCharset, AsciiSpeed } from './constants'
export { MULTICOLOR_PALETTE } from './constants'
